title: Corteva Announces Dates for Fourth Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Webcast
text: INDIANAPOLIS , Dec. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Corteva, Inc. (NYSE: CTVA) today announced it will release its fourth quarter 2023 earnings on Wednesday, January 31, 2024, after the stock market close via press release and its website. The earnings will be presented in a live webcast on Thursday, February 1, 2024, at 9:00 a.m.

title: Expanded Farmer Access to Corteva's Enlist® Herbicides Anticipated for 2024 Growing Season
text: INDIANAPOLIS , Dec. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- After successfully completing a comprehensive Endangered Species Act (ESA) consultation process, Corteva Agriscience's innovative Enlist® herbicides are poised for expanded use in formerly restricted counties in key growing regions across the U.S. The rigorous ESA review was initially conducted by the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA), then largely confirmed by consultation with the U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service (FWS). The result is a Final Biological Opinion (BiOp) that supports the restoration of previously restricted counties for use of Enlist herbicides – including counties in Texas and Georgia – and the elimination of all whole-county application restrictions, broadening farmers' future access to this unique and effective system for sustainable weed control.
